parameters.jsCode:
const audit = $input.first().json;

const headers = ['leadId','businessName','website','overallScore','priorityScore','performance','accessibility','bestPractices','seo','hasHttps','hasForm','hasCTA','hasViewport','issues','redesignReason','auditedAt'];

const row = {
  leadId: audit.leadId,
  businessName: (audit.businessName || '').replace(/,/g, ';'),
  website: (audit.website || '').replace(/,/g, ';'),
  overallScore: String(audit.overallScore),
  priorityScore: String(audit.priorityScore),
  performance: String(audit.pageSpeedScores?.performance || 0),
  accessibility: String(audit.pageSpeedScores?.accessibility || 0),
  bestPractices: String(audit.pageSpeedScores?.bestPractices || 0),
  seo: String(audit.pageSpeedScores?.seo || 0),
  hasHttps: String(audit.analysis?.hasHttps || false),
  hasForm: String(audit.analysis?.hasForm || false),
  hasCTA: String(audit.analysis?.hasCTA || false),
  hasViewport: String(audit.analysis?.hasViewport || false),
  issues: (audit.issues || []).join('; ').replace(/,/g, ';'),
  redesignReason: (audit.redesignReason || '').replace(/,/g, ';'),
  auditedAt: audit.auditedAt
};

return { headers, row, count: 1 };
